channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: ELRA and Heifer International partner to boost youth agribusiness through affordable equipment leasing
item.description: The Equipment Leasing Registration Authority (ELRA) and Heifer International Nigeria have deepened their partnership to expand affordable equipment leasing for young entrepreneurs, aiming to unlock ac...

item.title: Dr Rolf Gomes' Heart of Australia initiative transforms rural healthcare access
item.description: Dr Rolf Gomes, Queensland's 2026 Australian of the Year, has revolutionised healthcare access for remote communities through his Heart of Australia mobile clinics. By outfitting trucks with diagnostic...

item.title: Kitchener Justice of the Peace Accused of Judicial Misconduct in Colleague Interaction
item.description: A Justice of the Peace in Kitchener, Ontario, is facing allegations of judicial misconduct related to inappropriate behavior toward a colleague, according to a report by CTV News. The incident, which ...

item.title: Dharmendra Pradhan criticizes Congress for exploiting students in political protests
item.description: Union Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan accused Congress leader Rahul Gandhi of using students as political tools during the CJP protest over NEET exam irregularities. The protest, which saw thous...

item.title: Burnham faces challenge of boosting public optimism amid rising pessimism in UK
item.description: A new Ipsos survey reveals widespread national pessimism under Prime Minister Andy Burnham, with 83% of Britons believing the country is heading in the wrong direction—a sharp increase from 55% in 198...

item.title: Congress leaders detained after protest outside PM Modi's residence over NEET paper leak as political tensions escalate
item.description: Senior Congress leaders, including party president Mallikarjun Kharge, Rahul Gandhi and Priyanka Gandhi Vadra, staged a surprise sit-in protest outside Prime Minister Narendra Modi's residence in New ...

item.title: Chelsea signs Morgan Rogers on long-term deal
item.description: Chelsea FC has officially confirmed the signing of England international Morgan Rogers from Aston Villa. The 23-year-old forward, who has been a key player for Villa, joins the Blues on a contract unt...

item.title: Historical Photographs Reveal Daily Life in Chattanooga During the 1890s
item.description: These vintage photographs, captured by Charles Gustavus Walline (March 30, 1874—July 14, 1943), offer a rare and captivating glimpse into everyday life in Chattanooga, Tennessee, during the late 19th ...

item.title: Samuel Muchina to Oversee Ol Kalou Development Projects Despite By-Election Loss
item.description: UDA candidate Samuel Muchina has been tasked by President William Ruto to oversee major development projects in Ol Kalou Constituency, despite losing the parliamentary by-election to DCP's Sammy Kamau...

item.title: Scottish Labour Leader Anas Sarwar to Become Minister in Burnham's Government
item.description: Scottish Labour leader Anas Sarwar is set to resign from his role as leader of the Scottish Labour Party to take up a ministerial position in Andy Burnham's Labour government. This move would see Sarw...

item.title: Airbus Shifts 70 Critical Applications to French Cloud Provider Scaleway for Data Control
item.description: Airbus is transitioning 70 critical applications from Amazon Web Services (AWS) to the French cloud provider Scaleway as part of its digital sovereignty initiative. The move aims to keep sensitive dat...

item.title: Charli XCX Reflects on Career Choices in New Single 'Camera'
item.description: Charli XCX has released her introspective single 'Camera', accompanied by a music video directed by longtime collaborator Aidan Zamiri and featuring French actor Vincent Cassel. The track, part of her...

item.title: Provinces Cut Alcohol Sales Barriers Amid U.S. Tariff Threats
item.description: The article highlights the agreement among Canadian provinces to remove barriers on direct-to-consumer alcohol sales, a decision driven by concerns over U.S. President Donald Trump's threats of tariff...

item.title: Uttarakhand HC criticises state for detaining activist joining CJP protest
item.description: The Uttarakhand High Court has condemned the state government for detaining political activist Prabhat Dhyani after he expressed intent to join the Cockroach Janta Party's protest in Delhi. The court'...

item.title: SABC1 Reshuffles Weeknight Schedule with Uzalo and Generations: The Legacy
item.description: SABC1 has announced a significant change to its weekday primetime schedule, moving the long-running soap opera 'Generations: The Legacy' to 8.30pm starting 27 July 2026. This marks the first timeslot ...

item.title: Tanzania faces financial transparency challenges after Katoro cash display
item.description: A public display of 1.004 billion Tanzanian shillings in Katoro, Geita, has sparked national debate about currency management and financial transparency. While the event itself poses no direct economi...

item.title: Zelensky Replaces Army Chief Amid Protests and Political Tensions
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky replaced his long-serving army chief, Oleksandr Syrsky, with joint forces commander Mykhailo Drapaty after weeks of protests. The move came following the removal...

item.title: Queer Art and Church Spaces: A Global Historical Perspective
item.description: The article explores the historical intersection between queer art and church spaces, highlighting both tensions and collaborations. It begins with the closure of Divine Playhouse, a queer arts venue ...

item.title: Bran Muffin Recipe: Versatile Option with or without Raisins
item.description: This article presents a wholesome bran muffin recipe that can be prepared with or without raisins, catering to different preferences. The recipe highlights the debate around raisins in bran muffins, w...

item.title: Tanya Aguila's initiatives to promote women's health and empowerment
item.description: Tanya Aguila, a prominent figure in Philippine society, is championing a visionary approach to enhance the well-being and strength of women. Her initiatives focus on creating a healthier generation th...
